applies_to: Any retained C inside the FBVBS trusted path
entry_criteria: the code is a documented leaf hardware-boundary unit
the Ada/SPARK side owns policy and orchestration
the ABI is fixed-width integer only
the safety contract is documented in the repository

compiler_baseline: warnings enabled for pedantic, conversion, sign-conversion, strict-prototypes, missing-prototypes, shadowing, and undefined-macro usage
warnings treated as errors in the retained C build
misra_c: documented MISRA C profile and deviations
reviewed justifications for any permitted deviations
static_analysis: repository compiler static-analysis pass via `make -C hypervisor analyze`
flow-sensitive static analysis for undefined behavior, aliasing, integer bounds, and dead code
recorded results stored as reviewable artifacts
formal_verification: function contracts for each C leaf entry point
proof or model-checking artifacts for contract conformance and memory safety
reviewable assumptions about hardware effects and compiler behavior
review: ABI boundary review against Ada/SPARK declarations

misra_checkers: MISRA-capable commercial or qualified analysis tool

exit_condition: A retained C unit is acceptable only when all required evidence exists and the unit remains within the documented leaf boundary.
